channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Screenings of Oscar-nominated film 'The Voice of Hind Rajab' begin in South Africa
item.description: The Oscar-nominated film 'The Voice of Hind Rajab' will start screening in South African cinemas this weekend, bringing international attention to the tragic final hours of five-year-old Hind Rajab du...

item.title: Family Homes Funds trains 572 artisans with job opportunities in Abuja
item.description: Family Homes Funds Limited don successfully graduate 572 artisans from im pilot skills acquisition programme. The graduation ceremony happen for Karsana, Abuja, where 72 beneficiaries based in Abuja d...

item.title: Hearts and Celtic set for decisive final-day Scottish Premiership showdown after late penalty controversy
item.description: Hearts manager Derek McInnes has condemned a last-minute penalty awarded to Celtic as 'disgusting', following a 3-0 victory over Falkirk that would have put Hearts in control of the Scottish Premiersh...

item.title: OnlyFans Creators Navigate Leaving the Platform and Managing Online Privacy
item.description: As OnlyFans experiences a wave of early creators exiting the platform, questions about consent, privacy, and the long-term impact of online sex work have come to the forefront. Creators like Win White...

item.title: Reflections on Kitty Go’s Map-Themed Art Exhibition
item.description: Kitty Go, a renowned art professional and journalist, recently showcased a unique map-themed exhibition titled 'World on a Wall.' The exhibit offered visitors a chance to explore her artistic interpre...

item.title: Metropolitan Police deploy thousands of officers to manage rival London protests
item.description: The Metropolitan Police is preparing for one of its largest protest deployments in decades, as rival demonstrations are scheduled to take place in central London this Saturday. More than 4,000 officer...

item.title: Reform UK councillor suspended over controversial social media posts
item.description: Nathaniel Menday, recently elected to represent the Woodhouse ward on Sheffield City Council, has been suspended from Reform UK while the party investigates social media posts which are said to have b...

item.title: Inter Milan beat Lazio 2-0 to win Italian Cup and Serie A
item.description: Inter Milan don carry Italian Cup trophy after dem beat Lazio 2-0 for Stadio Olimpico, Rome. Dem don also complete domestic double with their 21st Serie A title. For the match, Adam Marusic comot own ...

item.title: Potential Leadership Challenge for Labour Party if Streeting Moves Forward
item.description: Reports suggest that Streeting, a prominent figure within the Labour Party, may initiate a leadership contest to replace current leader Keir Starmer. The situation has raised considerable speculation ...

item.title: Kentucky House candidate ends campaign after being caught taking opponent's flyer
item.description: A Democratic candidate for Kentucky's House District 30, Maxwell Morley, has withdrawn from the race after a doorbell camera recorded him removing a campaign flyer belonging to his opponent, incumbent...

item.title: Aerodynamic Analysis of the 2026 World Cup Ball: Trionda's Flight Characteristics

item.title: Philippine Senator Faces ICC Warrant Amid Senate Gunfire Incident
item.description: An alarming incident occurred at the Philippine Senate involving gunfire, coinciding with a lawmaker who is currently wanted by the International Criminal Court (ICC) resisting authorities. Reports in...

item.title: Karnataka allows students to wear hijab and sacred thread in schools, overturning 2022 restriction
item.description: The Karnataka government has recently revoked its 2022 order that prohibited wearing the hijab and the sacred thread in educational institutions, allowing students to now freely practise their religio...

item.title: Security incident at Senate: Armed individuals blocked and investigated
item.description: On May 14, 2026, a tense security situation occurred at the Philippine Senate when armed men allegedly tried to enter the building through its second floor. Interior Secretary Jonvic Remulla reported ...

item.title: Alaves Beat Barcelona, Preventing Them From Reaching 100 La Liga Points
item.description: Barcelona, wey don already secure La Liga trophy, shockingly lose 1-0 to Alaves on Wednesday. Dem need to win di remaining three matches make dem reach 100 points, but dem stumble for Vitoria. Ibrahim...

item.title: Vodacom Upgrades M-Pesa with USD 28 Million Platform to Boost Digital Finance
item.description: On 2nd April 2026, Vodacom Tanzania officially launched the M-Pesa Fintech 2.0 platform, investing USD 28 million to modernize its mobile money system. This new generation platform is designed to hand...

item.title: Celebrity Heights and Weights: How 140 Pounds Looks Across Different Builds
item.description: This article highlights 25 well-known celebrities who each weigh 140 pounds in 2026, showing how their height greatly affects how this weight appears on their body. Heights range from 5 feet 2 inches ...

item.title: Cotabato Highway Patrol Officer Injured in Motorcycle Shooting Incident
item.description: A policeman from the Cotabato Provincial Highway Patrol Team was wounded in an attack by two men riding a motorcycle in Matalam town, Cotabato on May 12, 2026. Police Senior Master Sgt. Noel Demate su...

item.title: Heineken House Brings Sport, Music and Culture Together in Lagos
item.description: For one full week in May, Lagos gbam-bam style hosted the Heineken House Experience, turning Ilubirin into correct hub for football, Formula 1, music, and social connection. The event ran alongside UE...

item.title: Understanding Core Nigerian Values and Their Role in Society
item.description: Nigerian values na the guiding principles wey dey shape how people dey live, work, and relate with each other across the country. Dem dey rooted for culture, religion, and the history of more than 220...
